name: manage_project_state
description: Evals for the manage_project_state skill — verify it triggers on the right tasks and skips on the wrong ones.

evals.name: triggers_on_new_phase_log
evals.input: I just closed the auth migration for Acme. Record the outcome in the project_management repo.
evals.reason: Chronological log entry on a product's project_management → use this skill.

evals.name: triggers_on_initialize_new_product
evals.input: We're starting a new product called Foo. Initialize its project_management.
evals.reason: Initialization of a new product's project_management.

evals.name: triggers_on_repo_map_update
evals.input: I renamed acme/project-management to acme/project_management. Update the repository map.
evals.reason: Structural repo change → 00_Mapa_Repositorios.md must be updated, which lives in project_management.

evals.name: skips_on_code_readme
evals.input: Update the README of Acme's backend to explain how to run the tests.
evals.reason: Technical README of a code repo — does NOT belong in project_management. This skill should NOT activate.

evals.name: skips_on_ephemeral_chat
evals.reason: Pure information request, no state to record.
